scheme_name: Nippon India Silver ETF Fund of Fund (Direct - Growth)

sections.overview: Key Information: | Category: Commodities / Alternative - Silver ETF Fund of Fund. | Riskometer: Very High Risk.
sections.exit_load: 1% if redeemed or switched out on or before 15 days from the date of allotment; Nil (0%) exit load if redeemed or switched out after 15 days from allotment.
sections.minimum_investment: Minimum SIP: Rs. 100 per month.. Minimum Lumpsum: Rs. 100.
sections.benchmark: Domestic Price of Silver (based on LBMA Silver daily spot fixing price).
sections.tax: Taxation rules for Commodity/Silver schemes: Gains on redemption are treated as per Debt fund rules. Since April 1, 2023, gains from debt-oriented mutual funds are taxed at the investor's individual income tax slab rate (marginal taxation) regardless of the holding period, and LTCG tax benefits with indexation are no longer applicable.
sections.fund_management:
- Jitendra Tolani: Fund Manager. Over 18 years of experience in financial services, asset allocation, and commodity markets. Specializes in managing gold and silver passive schemes.
- Mehul Dama: Co-Fund Manager. Dedicated analyst with over 15 years of tracking passive funds, ETFs, and commodities.
- Himanshu Mange: Dedicated Co-Fund Manager with over 10 years of experience in backend operations and passive fund compliance.
sections.investment_objective: The investment objective of the scheme is to seek to provide returns that closely correspond to the returns provided by Nippon India Silver ETF, which tracks the domestic price of silver.
sections.fund_house: Nippon India Mutual Fund (formerly Reliance Mutual Fund) is one of India's leading mutual fund houses. It is sponsored by Nippon Life Insurance Company of Japan, one of the largest life insurers in the world. The AMC is registered under SEBI and manages a diverse range of mutual fund schemes.
sections.pe_pb_ratio: PE Ratio: Not Applicable (Commodity Fund)., PB Ratio: Not Applicable (Commodity Fund).
